channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by YouTrend for Sky TG 24, 6–9 February 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Italia Viva (RE): 0 seats
  • Più Europa (RE): 0 seats
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 21–28 seats
  • Futuro Nazionale (NI): 0–5 seats
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0–1 seats
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 15–21 seats
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 8–12 seats
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 5–9 seats
  • Azione (RE): 0–5 seats
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1–4 seats
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4–7 seats
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 3–5 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by YouTrend for Sky TG 24, 6–9 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by YouTrend for Sky TG 24, 6–9 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.5–1.9%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.4–3.5%
  • Più Europa (RE): 1.1–3.0%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 25.9–32.2%
  • Futuro Nazionale (NI): 2.8–5.5%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.4%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 18.5–24.2%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 9.7–14.2%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 7.6–11.7%
  • Azione (RE): 2.9–5.6%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.7–3.9%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4.8–8.1%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.7–5.3%

item.title: Opinion Poll by SWG for La7, 4–9 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:

  • Più Europa (RE): 0.9–2.4%

  • Azione (RE): 2.2–4.2%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.6–3.4%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 5.3–8.1%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.6–4.7%
